## Meeting Purpose

[Introductory call between GrowthX and Aperio to explore potential collaboration on content marketing and SEO strategy.](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX offers end-to-end AI-powered content creation and SEO services, focusing on editorial content](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Aperio addresses data quality issues in OT data for industrial clients, using unsupervised ML and AI](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Aperio is currently focused on refining their go-to-market strategy and identifying urgent use cases](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=459.0)
  - [Collaboration potential exists, but Aperio needs to solidify their marketing approach before engaging GrowthX's services](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=858.0)

## Topics

### GrowthX's Offering

  - [End-to-end agency partner for SEO, content strategy, and execution](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=183.0)
  - [Focus on editorial content (blogs, guides) to build topical authority](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=198.0)
  - [AI-powered workflows with human expertise for scalable, quality content](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=240.0)
  - [Two-phase engagement: (1) Persona/company research, (2) Daily content publishing](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [Examples: Towne's blog, Engine's business travel guides, Augment Code's AI tool comparisons](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=765.0)

### Aperio's Business and Challenges

  - [Addresses data quality issues in OT (Operational Technology) data using ML/AI](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=288.0)
  - [Target clients: Industrial companies (e.g., Chevron, P\&G, Devon Energy)](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=424.0)
  - [Current focus: Transitioning from IT feature sales to value-based ops team sales](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=546.0)
  - [Challenge: Identifying urgent use cases and refining go-to-market strategy](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=509.0)
  - [Team of 30 people, working with 30 logos (mix of paying/non-paying customers)](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=446.0)

### Content Marketing Strategy Considerations

  - [AI search visits convert 4.4x more, spend 3x longer on site](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=631.0)
  - [Aperio needs to establish thought leadership in data quality space](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=873.0)
  - [Current lack of subject matter expert-created content](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=914.0)
  - [Potential to differentiate from competitors through educational content](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1114.0)

### GrowthX's Content Creation Process

  - [Rich persona/company/voice artifacts development](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=703.0)
  - [Calibration articles to align on quality standards](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=676.0)
  - [AI-powered research and fact-checking workflows](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=993.0)
  - [Human editors in the loop for context-aware refinement](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1011.0)
  - [Custom knowledge base and analytics capabilities (upcoming)](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1059.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Revisit potential collaboration in 4-5 months (end of Q4 2025)](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1084.0)
  - [Aperio to focus on refining go-to-market strategy and identifying target audience](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=931.0)
  - [GrowthX to continue platform development, including customer-facing features](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1072.0)
  - [Potential for future discussion on establishing Aperio as an authority in data quality space](https://fathom.video/share/_H5Rq1nBpfiYdVuZqfRKF1v-3d8J5m1N?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
